title: [hwarith] Failed to materialize error
body:
```
hw.module @test1() -> (out: ui8) {
  %1 = hwarith.constant 1 : ui8
  hw.output %1 : ui8
}
```

yields

```
hwarith_test.mlir:2:8: error: failed to materialize conversion for result #0 of operation 'hwarith.constant' that remained live after conversion
  %1 = hwarith.constant 1 : ui8
       ^
hwarith_test.mlir:2:8: note: see current operation: %1 = "hwarith.constant"() {rawValue = 1 : ui8} : () -> ui8
hwarith_test.mlir:3:3: note: see existing live user here: hw.output %0 : ui8
  hw.output %1 : ui8
```
